_comment: 100% synthetic funnel performance data for Funnel Watchtower (Claw-a-thon 2026, Team UW). No real customers or partner data. Small sample: one partner, 6 months. Stages: Traffic -> Submission -> Approval -> Disbursement.

stage_definitions.traffic: Users who are eligible and enter the lending flow (eligible traffic only).
stage_definitions.submission: Users whose application is successfully submitted and received by the partner.
stage_definitions.approval: Users who are approved by the partner.
stage_definitions.disbursement: Users who receive any disbursed amount from the partner.
